CustomField.formula:
IF(ISBLANK( FirstName ),0,1) + IF(ISBLANK( Title ),0,1)+IF(ISBLANK( Email),0,1)+IF(ISBLANK( Preferred_Language__c ),0,1)+IF(ISBLANK( MailingAddress ),0,1) +
IF( ISPICKVAL( Salutation ,""), 0,1) + IF(LEN(Phone) = 0, 0,1)/* + IF( ISPICKVAL( Job_Function__c ,""), 0,1)*/ +IF( ISBLANK( Areas_of_Work__c ), 0,1) + IF(ISBLANK( Product_Interest__c ),0,1)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The profile completeness score depends on providing accurate information in the following fields First name Salutation Job function Title Phone Email Preferred Language Mailing Address Market Segment Primary Product Interest
CustomField.label: Profile Completeness Score
